```bash
pack version
```
This feature requires a working buildpacks installation.

steps.title: Review buildpacks configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant buildpacks configuration:
### Description
As part of the release process, create & publish a Docker image that contains pack, like:
https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/cloud-builders-community/tree/master/pack

To use pack from systems like GitHub Actions, Cloud Build,

steps.title: Apply the fix for Docker Image with Pack
steps.description:
## Summary

This PR adds a Github action to release a `pack` Docker image to `cnbs/pack` on a new release. It currently creates three tags:
* `buildpacksio/pack:0.11.2`
* `buildpacksio/pack:latest`

I ran it, and created the images at `dfreilich/pack:...`
 
## Output

`$ act -j deliver-docker -s
```yaml
FROM alpine:3.10

ARG PACK_VERSION
ENV PACK_URL https://github.com/buildpack/pack/releases/download/${PACK_VERSION}/pack-${PACK_VERSION}-linux.tgz
RUN wget -O- "${PACK_URL}" | tar -C /usr/local/bin -xz pack
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Docker Image with Pack" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
## Summary

This PR adds a Github action to release a `pack` Docker image to `cnbs/pack` on a new release.
codeSnippets:
FROM alpine:3.10

ARG PACK_VERSION
ENV PACK_URL https://github.com/buildpack/pack/releases/download/${PACK_VERSION}/pack-${PACK_VERSION}-linux.tgz
RUN wget -O- "${PACK_URL}" | tar -C /usr/local/bin -xz pack

FROM busybox
ENV PACK_VERSION=v0.7.0
RUN wget -O- https://github.com/buildpack/pack/releases/download/${PACK_VERSION}/pack-${PACK_VERSION}-linux.tgz | tar zx

FROM gcr.io/distroless/base
ENTRYPOINT ["/pack"]
COPY --from=0 /pack /

prerequisites.description: A working buildpacks installation or development environment.
